name: google-sheets-sync-backend
description: Node.js webhook receiver for syncing Google Sheets rows into PostgreSQL.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/db/pool.js && node --check src/db/sheetSyncRepository.js && node --check src/middleware/verifyWebhookToken.js && node --check src/routes/healthRoutes.js && node --check src/routes/webhookRoutes.js && node --check src/services/sheetSyncService.js && node --check src/utils/logger.js
